title: elatostema obtusum var. trilobulatum
intro: Elatostema obtusum var. trilobulatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae, commonly known as the water wisteria or Chinese water chestnut, but it is not water wisteria, it is actually a type of stinging nettle. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Elatostema obtusum var. trilobulatum is said to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating colds, and alleviating pain and inflammation. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
